reviews.review_title: This game is better then gorilla tag
reviews.review_description:
Reasons on why this game is better:
1. Millions of shiny rocks
2. This game gives me like a boost on movement
3. Met a lot of friends ( I meant more toxic people in this game then the real gorilla tag)
4. It has my favorite updates

Also I get reported because of my run 
( I ain’t cheating 😭😭)

reviews.review_description: Routes are easy to do in this map but they are easier in the spring update with the green vines. Colls, put the spring update back on

reviews.review_title: REALLY GOOD but there was a bug
reviews.review_description: So the game is really good you get a little bit of a stretch on your arms so it’s a little longer but there is a glitch so basically it’s like you are in a lobby and you go out to forest but you have to wait like 10 minutes before you can get in a game but other than that it’s really good and the updates are good and you have a better speed boost by a little so that’s the game and I hope to get mod so yeah.
